papers.title: Learning to Communicate Locally for Large-Scale Multi-Agent Pathfinding
papers.title_zh: 大规模多智能体路径规划中的局部通信学习
papers.summary: We propose a scalable decentralized multi-agent pathfinding solver based on local communication learning.
papers.contribution_zh: 提出基于局部通信的可扩展去中心化多智能体路径规划求解器
papers.value_zh: 适用于物流仓储多机器人协同、大规模实时调度场景

papers.title: Nexus: An Agentic Framework for Time Series Forecasting
papers.title_zh: Nexus：面向时间序列预测的智能体框架
papers.summary: A multi-agent framework fusing time series foundation models and LLMs for cross-domain forecasting.
papers.contribution_zh: 融合时间序列基础模型与LLM的多智能体预测框架，解决跨领域上下文信号问题
papers.value_zh: 直接应用于销售预测、库存管理、供应链风险预测等决策场景

papers.title: Dynamic Latent Routing
papers.summary: We propose generalized Dijkstra search (GDS) and dynamic latent routing (DLR) for complex decision problems.
papers.contribution_zh: 提出广义Dijkstra搜索与动态潜路由方法，将MDP最优策略分解为子策略
papers.value_zh: 适用于物流网络动态路由与调度问题

papers.title: SPIN: Structural LLM Planning via Iterative Navigation for Industrial Tasks
papers.title_zh: SPIN：面向工业任务的结构化LLM规划与迭代导航
papers.summary: SPIN framework combines DAG validation and prefix execution control to ensure valid and length-optimal industrial workflows.
papers.contribution_zh: 结合DAG验证与前缀式执行控制，确保LLM生成的工业工作流结构有效且长度最优
papers.value_zh: 适用于生产调度、物流流程编排等工业自动化场景
